_comment: Toy spec that PASSES manifest_lint: hydrated body, parseable acceptance, and a scope boundary.
body: Implement GET /widgets returning a paginated list. Given a request with a limit query param, When the handler runs, Then it returns at most `limit` widgets plus a next cursor. Enforce a maximum page size of 100.
acceptance: Includes a next cursor when more rows remain
Rejects a limit above 100 with a 400
